scripts.pages:deploy: npx @cloudflare/next-on-pages && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); function walk(dir) { let results = []; const list = fs.readdirSync(dir); list.forEach(file => { file = path.join(dir, file); const stat = fs.statSync(file); if (stat && stat.isDirectory()) { results = results.concat(walk(file)); } else { results.push(file); } }); return results; }; walk('.vercel/output/static/_worker.js/__next-on-pages-dist__/functions').filter(f => f.endsWith('.func.js')).forEach(f => fs.writeFileSync(f, fs.readFileSync(f, 'utf8').replace(/\"async_hooks\"/g, '\"node:async_hooks\"')));" && npx wrangler pages deploy --no-bundle
